## How to test

Commands run locally:

```bash
pytest
```

Additional checks:

- [ ] Documentation builds with `mkdocs build`
- [ ] Package builds with `python -m build`
- [ ] `python -m twine check dist/*` passes, if packaging files changed

- [ ] I verified that existing tests pass.
